item.title: Storybook MCP with Dominic Nguyen
item.description: Brad Frost and Storybook founder on how Storybook MCP lets AI generate new features using existing system components.

item.title: How I Use Claude Code to Vibe Code My Designs
item.description: Workflow: Figma JSON tokens → custom shadcn/ui theme → Figma Console MCP to generate variants and turn designs into code.

item.title: awesome-agent-skills — 1,060+ skills from official dev teams for Claude Code, Cursor, Codex
item.description: 13k-star catalog of 1,060+ agent skills from official teams including Figma, Anthropic, Vercel, and Stripe.

item.title: Superpowers — agentic skills framework for Claude Code
item.description: Skills framework for Claude Code: brainstorming, planning, debugging — 131K stars.

item.title: Cursor 3: Design Mode, Agents Window, and Parallel Execution
item.description: Cursor 3 ships Design Mode for annotating browser UI elements and an Agents Window for parallel cloud agent runs.

item.title: awesome-design-md — Brand Design Systems as DESIGN.md for AI Agents
item.description: 55 DESIGN.md files from Figma, Linear, Stripe — drop one in your project, AI builds matching brand UI.

item.title: Building a Figma-Driven MCP Production Pipeline
item.description: Practitioner guide to a production Figma MCP pipeline: IDE config, tool call sequencing, and automation rules.

item.title: Agentic AI, Design Systems & Figma: A Practical Guide
item.description: Six concrete steps to make Figma components AI-agent-ready: tokens, prop matching, states, slots, Code Connect.

item.title: What Your Components Look Like as Data
item.description: How Figma design decisions become machine-readable data for AI tools, and why this changes how you should structure components.

item.title: Designers, You're Not at the Kids' Table Anymore
item.description: AI tools + MCP + structured design systems now let designers contribute production code without traditional programming skills.

item.title: Your Ticket Is a Prompt
item.description: Atomic tickets harm agents: how to rewrite task descriptions for agentic workflows.

item.title: Figma-Context-MCP — Figma layout context for AI coding agents
item.description: MCP server that simplifies Figma API responses so AI agents generate more accurate code.

item.title: GenUI vs. Vibe Coding: Who's Designing?
item.description: NNGroup defines the split: GenUI is AI deciding to build UI; vibe coding is users asking for it. Each requires a different quality bar.

item.title: interface-design
item.description: Claude Code skill that enforces UI consistency — reads design principles, applies patterns, explains design choices before each component.

item.title: State of the Designer 2026: Designers Are Leaning Into the Messy Middle
item.description: 906 designers surveyed: 89% say AI makes them faster; 73% of hiring managers now require AI tool proficiency.

item.title: I Built a Design Team Out of AI Agents
item.description: Designpowers: 10 specialist agents covering the full design process from Discovery to Ship.

item.title: harness — Meta-skill that designs domain-specific agent teams for Claude Code
item.description: Claude Code meta-skill that decomposes a project into specialized agent teams and auto-generates their supporting skills.

item.title: Design Systems Report 2026
item.description: Only 40% of teams have token pipelines; AI impact on design systems still mixed across 147 practitioners.

item.title: AI in design systems: What's changing in 2026
item.description: Elyse Holladay on three shifts reshaping design systems in 2026: MCP steering, design-with-code, and component schemas.

item.title: Agents, Meet the Figma Canvas
item.description: Agents write to canvas via MCP server. Design system quality now directly determines output quality.
